query_normalized: residue distribution of euler's totient function modulo small primes mathematics
rationale: The paper studies the occurrence of \(q^{\text{th}}\) power residues modulo integers with few prime factors, which is unrelated to the distribution of Euler’s totient function residues modulo small primes; it does not address the same arithmetic function or mechanism. Hence it does not belong in the literature review for the given question.
